scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Female waitress (image2) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron leans on the counter scrolling through her phone with one hand, chatting with brunette young woman (image3) in cream cable-knit sweater and dark wash jeans who stands nearby facing her. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Customers seated in red booths. Warm afternoon light. No customers behind counter.
